chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-775 of 2024 Mst. Faria Dilshad Versus Mst. Aziz Fatima & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.3693/24 2. For orders on Misc. no.3694/24 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 23.02.2024 None present. -.-.- The trial Court dismissed an application under order VII Rule 11 CPC in a suit filed by one Aziz Fatima i.e. respondent No.1 for declaration, cancellation of documents, damages and permanent injunction. An exhaustive order while dismissing application was passed against which, although no remedy of appeal is available, the petitioner preferred revision application No.119 of 2022 which maintained the order of the trial Court. Aggrieved of the concurrent findings of the two Courts below this petition is filed by the petitioner in person who is called absent. Since no one is in attendance dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge
